entity.summary: Global centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched as Wisebitcoin in May 2018 and rebranded to Batonex in February 2023, offering spot and perpetual trading, deposits, withdrawals, and mobile access.
entity.notes: HEI models Wisebitcoin and Batonex as one continuing exchange entity. The original Wisebitcoin launch release was issued from Kingstown, Saint Vincent and the Grenadines, while current exchange directories describe Batonex as headquartered in Singapore; country_or_origin therefore uses the current Singapore/global identity and preserves the launch-location detail in evidence notes.

events.title: Wisebitcoin exchange launched
events.description: Wisebitcoin announced that its cryptocurrency trading platform was live with leveraged trading through the MetaTrader 5 engine.
events.notes: Two contemporary publication copies preserve the exact launch announcement, and a current exchange directory corroborates the 2018 founding year.

events.title: Wisebitcoin announced its rebrand to Batonex
events.description: Wisebitcoin announced a system overhaul and product-name change to Batonex while continuing the exchange service under the new brand.
events.notes: The rebrand is modeled as a continuing entity event rather than the death of Wisebitcoin and creation of a separate exchange.

evidence.title: Wisebitcoin Launches the First Ever Cryptocurrency Trading Platform with Leverage Levels up to 20:1
evidence.notes: Project-issued launch release states that the Wisebitcoin platform was up and running on May 26, 2018.

evidence.title: Wisebitcoin Launches the First Ever Cryptocurrency Trading Platform with Leverage Levels up to 20:1
evidence.notes: A second contemporary publication copy corroborates the exact live-platform announcement.

evidence.title: Batonex exchange profile
evidence.notes: Current profile identifies Batonex as the exchange formerly known as Wisebitcoin and records its 2018 founding and Singapore identity.

evidence.title: Wisebitcoin rebrands as Batonex
evidence.notes: Dated report records Wisebitcoin's announcement of the Batonex system and product-name transition.

evidence.title: Wisebitcoin system reorganization and product name change guide
evidence.notes: Archive of the exchange announcement channel preserves the Wisebitcoin-to-Batonex product-name-change notice.

evidence.title: How to Register
evidence.notes: Current first-party instructions link registration, exchange access, deposits, and the rewards center.

evidence.title: Batonex fees
evidence.notes: First-party fee schedule documents current spot and perpetual-futures trading fees.
